name: Path to Glory
author: Poki
description: Path to Glory is an action game where you step into the boots of a brave soldier, determined to carve your way to ultimate glory! Navigate through a treacherous forest, fighting off waves of invaders who stand in your way. As you progress, improve your combat skills, upgrade your weaponry, and strategize to defeat increasingly powerful foes. Your journey will culminate in a final battle where you'll face the king himself. Defeat him, and you can claim the throne as your own. The path is full of danger, but do you have the courage and strength to achieve your destiny and claim the ultimate glory? How to play Path to Glory? Move: WASD Attack: left click or the space bar Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Path to Glory? Path to Glory is created by Rémi Vansteelandt. Play their other games on Poki: SuperBrawl , Ninja vs EVILCORP and Earth's Greatest Defender ! How can I play Path to Glory for free? You can play Path to Glory for free on Poki. Can I play Path to Glory on mobile devices and desktop? Path to Glory can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
